evals.expected_output: A triage table showing APM error groups across services, organized by priority (P1 unhandled first, then by frequency), with a prompt asking which ones to create GitHub issues for

assertions.name: fetches_multiple_services
assertions.description: Output references errors from more than one APM service

assertions.name: shows_priority_triage
assertions.description: Output contains P1/P2/P3/P4 priority labels or equivalent tiering

assertions.name: unhandled_highlighted
assertions.description: Unhandled exceptions (handled: false) are called out distinctly from handled errors

assertions.name: includes_occurrence_count
assertions.description: Each error entry shows the occurrence count

assertions.name: asks_user_to_select
assertions.description: Output ends by asking the user which errors to create GitHub issues for

assertions.name: filters_spam_noise
assertions.description: Spam-detection or obvious-noise errors are skipped or noted separately

evals.prompt: what's breaking in firstory-hosting-server right now? show me the top errors
evals.expected_output: Fetches error groups for firstory-hosting-server service specifically, shows prioritized list with occurrences and culprit info

assertions.name: correct_service_targeted
assertions.description: API call or output explicitly targets firstory-hosting-server (not all services)

assertions.name: shows_culprit_and_timestamp
assertions.description: Each error includes the culprit file/location and last occurrence timestamp

assertions.name: priority_ordering
assertions.description: Errors are ordered or labeled by priority (unhandled first, then by frequency)

evals.prompt: create github issues for the top APM errors in firstory-membership-server
evals.expected_output: Fetches errors for firstory-membership-server, shows triage summary, asks which repo to file against, then shows gh commands with proper title/body format including APM link, priority label, occurrence count

assertions.name: triage_shown_before_issues
assertions.description: Shows error triage summary BEFORE asking about or creating GitHub issues

assertions.name: asks_for_repo
assertions.description: Asks which GitHub repo to file issues against

assertions.name: gh_command_has_apm_link
assertions.description: Proposed gh issue command body includes an APM deep link URL for the error group

assertions.name: gh_command_has_priority
assertions.description: Proposed gh issue command includes priority level (P1/P2/P3/P4)

assertions.name: gh_command_structured_body
assertions.description: Issue body uses a structured format (table or labeled fields) not a wall of text
